initiatives.name: Lunch Punks
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and food justice in Aurora. They coordinate food distribution, community meals, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action and creating spaces for collective care and nourishment.

initiatives.name: Denver-Aurora Community Action Committee
initiatives.description: A group of local organizers combating injustice and fighting for equality in Denver and Aurora through education, advocacy, and direct action.

initiatives.name: Aurora Unidos CSO
initiatives.description: We are a grassroots group welcoming all who stand for immigrant rights and justice.
